title: taraxacum zelotes
intro: Taraxacum zelotes, also known as the dwarf dandelion, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum zelotes include its ability to support kidney and liver function, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum zelotes can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to aid in digestion and reduce symptoms of anxiety and stress.
